perks.name: LIFE CHARM
perks.description: Increases maximum life by 25 percent.

perks.name: MANA CHARM
perks.description: Increases maximum mana by 25 percent.

perks.name: SPEED CHARM
perks.description: Increases movement and casting speed by 10 percent.

perks.name: ITEM CHARM
perks.description: Improves the chance that useful items drop.

perks.name: GOLD CHARM
perks.description: Improves gold drop chance and quantity.

perks.name: SEEKER'S CHARM
perks.description: Reveals directions to gold, items, and upgrades.

perks.name: REVELATION CHARM
perks.description: Newly learned skills start at level two.

perks.name: CHEAT DEATH CHARM
perks.description: Survives one killing blow and restores half of maximum life.

perks.name: PERKY CHARM
perks.description: Adds level-up choices and lowers item and skill requirements by two.

perks.name: SCATTER CURSE
perks.description: Killed monsters scatter more and larger orbs.

perks.name: WAR CHARM
perks.description: Reduces offensive spell mana costs by 25 percent.

perks.name: CURING CHARM
perks.description: Reduces poison damage by 50 percent.

perks.name: THE LAST WORD CHARM
perks.description: Explodes on death for large area damage and changes final drops.

perks.name: SPELLWELDER'S CHARM
perks.description: Recombines welded spells when one component improves.

perks.name: WEIRD CASTER CHARM
perks.description: Grants a new secondary spell and favors secondary choices.

perks.name: DRINKER'S CHARM
perks.description: Automatically drinks owned potions when needed.

perks.name: GLASS CANNON CURSE
perks.description: Doubles damage dealt and damage taken.

perks.name: SORCEROR'S CHARM
perks.description: Allows one level-up reroll or preserves the reroll for later.

perks.name: FOCUS CHARM
perks.description: Reduces spell cooldowns by 25 percent.

perks.name: DISFIGURING CURSE
perks.description: Enables all three ring slots.

perks.name: BARE HANDS CHARM
perks.description: Without a weapon, increases damage by 15 percent and reduces mana cost by 15 percent.

perks.name: SPLIT MIND CHARM
perks.description: Concentrates progression on two selected skills.

perks.name: CURSE BOSSES
perks.description: Makes bosses take triple damage.

perks.name: ARCANE ATTRACTOR CHARM
perks.description: Greatly improves the chance of magical upgrades.

perks.name: SERENDIPITY CHARM
perks.description: Triples spell damage until the owner is hurt.

perks.name: REVERIE CHARM
perks.description: Removes offensive spell mana costs until the owner is hurt.

perks.name: BRUTE'S CHARM
perks.description: Increases melee damage by 200 percent and pushing by 100 percent.

perks.name: TONIC
perks.description: Increases charm and curse capacity; at most two tonics apply.
